tickers.company: Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Ltd
tickers.one_line_thesis: Asia flagship exchange croupier at cycle-peak earnings; ~-0.15% base annual return at HK$383 implies watch until turnover normalizes or price resets.

DataSection is betting the Neo Cloud franchise on hyperscaler-linked AI data centres in Japan (Inzai) and Australia, with a FY2026 revenue step-up to ¥33.6B still guided post-Apr-2026 delays; the May 2026 shift to NVIDIA B300 via Compal (~USD 325M) and a disclosed financing bridge improves execution visibility but raises contract-renegotiation, debt-timing, and Giga-order overhang risk.

Japan asset manager and ETF group: FY26 AUM ¥1.34tn with success fees +53.6%; at last print ¥464 and ¥137 mid-cycle owner cash the synthesis return is 53.33% per year, but watch for illiquid tape and peak performance-fee earnings.

Japan's dominant exchange and clearing infrastructure — a Stahl croupier with ~58% operating margins and volume leverage — but earnings are cyclical with market turnover; do not treat FY2025 peak activity as a permanent baseline.
Abacus Life Inc. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Acadian Timber owns ~1.1M acres in Maine and New Brunswick and manages ~1.3M acres of Canadian Crown Lands — lean, income-oriented timberland in the land sleeve pending NAV overlay.
Altius Minerals Corporation — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

Dominant e-commerce + AWS platform compounding at scale (FY2025 $717B sales, $78B NI) with AWS re-accelerating (+28% Q1-26) and high-margin ads/chips engines emerging — but AI capex has temporarily collapsed FCF, requiring disciplined valuation and capex ROI monitoring.

AI data centre developer with accelerating revenue ($126.6M FQ3, +139% YoY) and 600+ MW of signed leases (CoreWeave, hyperscaler). FQ3 GAAP net income $100.9M includes $59.7M discontinued-operation gain (Cloud held-for-sale); continuing ops still loss-making on adjusted basis. Customer concentration and layered debt/preferred stack require capital-structure diligence before conviction sizing.
Australia's licensed exchange and clearing monopoly: FY2025 revenue $1.11B (+7%), 62.8% EBITDA margin, but ~6.9% base annual return at AUD 48.82 after CHESS capex drag → watch.
Arizona land and renewable-ground-rent optionality at a price that already embeds much of the acreage story; watch until owner-cash yield or overlay NAV offers margin of safety.
Brazil's dominant exchange croupier: diversified toll on listed, OTC, and data rails; watch at ~13% 7yr IRR until entry near R$12.50–13.50.
Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (Class B) — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Malaysia's exchange toll collector: durable franchise and net cash, but 6.3% base return at ~RM8.55 on peak-cycle FY2024 volumes warrants watch until mid-cycle cash yield improves.

Global alternative-asset compounder earning durable fee streams on $614B fee-bearing capital with scaling insurance/wealth platform ($180B assets), active buybacks, and corporate simplification (BN+BNT merge) — DE-focused valuation, not GAAP NI.

Burford Capital Limited — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

At ~$549, headline 3.07% per year (7yr blend) combines owner cash, scenarios, and NAV optionality; Lawrence cash alone is -1.4% while probability-weighted economic NAV is ~$1,480/sh.
Argentina exchange and CSD croupier with ~76% EBITDA margin; base IRR ~25% at ARS 296 but watch pending human Argentina sizing (dhando partial).

Cerebras is a high-growth wafer-scale AI chip and cloud vendor with a disclosed OpenAI mega-contract, but normalized owner cash, customer concentration, and IPO premium produce a negative base return at today's price; watch until post-IPO filings prove cash conversion.

Debt-free Louisiana land and royalty vehicle (7,023 net acres, ~$8.78/sh cash) inside an active strategic-alternatives process; watch at ~$10.59 on 3.7% base yield-curve IRR pending definitive transaction or repeatable acreage monetization.
CME Group Inc. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

CMSG is a cash-rich OTCQX bitcoin/scrypt miner where marked-to-market digital assets dominate GAAP earnings; the equity is largely a BTC-treasury and hash-share option under Horizon-affiliated governance — watch at 8.7% blended IRR (Marvin floor 7.7%); approved Substacks (LCI seigniorage) add partial treasury credit; fee redesign post-2026 and network-share trends.
Global salvage-vehicle auction toll booth de-rated to ~$33 — oligopoly economics intact; base IRR 9.2% (core override) while monitoring U.S. assignment/fee growth and Q3 FY2026 trends.
Circle Internet Group, Inc. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Wide-moat CRE platform de-rated to ~$33 (−54% YoY); Homes.com/Matterport distort GAAP — watch at 8.6% base IRR until normalized FCF proves out.
Decentralized VMS acquirer reinvesting FCFA2S at hurdle rates — base 16.0% IRR supports core stance; GAAP net income secondary to FCFA2S compounding.

European market-infrastructure croupier: vertically integrated trading, clearing, custody, and buy-side software with 63% recurring revenue; quality franchise at ~€246 yields synthesis ~14.5% per year (below 15% hold band) → watch.
DBS-driven life science/diagnostics platform — hold at 10.1% base IRR (quality override); cyclically tied to biopharma funding and China diagnostics recovery.
Dorchester Minerals LP — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
MAC-anchored ASX royalty at ~5% yield with Thacker Pass lithium option; 8.0% base five-year return at A$4.43; watch pending ASX doc pipeline and iron ore cycle.
Pan-European exchange croupier: FY2025 FCF €682M on €1.8B revenue; watch at ~10.3% synthesis IRR (quality franchise, price full).
CSE copper/tin junior royalty (Nomad team) ramping to four cash-flowing assets in 2026; hold at ~34% NAV discount with 14.9% synthesis return.
Franco-Nevada Corporation — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Pre-revenue powered-shell REIT developing Project Matador (~11 GW private power campus); asset-rich, tenant-gated, watch at 8.8% base return.

Horizon Kinetics–affiliated holding company with concentrated stakes in exchange infrastructure (MIH) and HKHC — a look-through bet on Murray Stahl's ecosystem, not an operating croupier; value = sum-of-parts vs fair-value accounting noise.
Garden City Co. — debt-free Kansas crop-share farmland and oil/gas royalties; watch at ~$1,284 (~-0.9% synthesis IRR); FY2024 owner cash ~$53/sh vs $40 dividend.
Galaxy Digital Inc. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

Search/YouTube ads cash engine plus Google Cloud AI infrastructure (+63% Q1 2026) — wide-moat compounder betting massive capex ($180–190B 2026) on Cloud ROI while navigating AI disruption to Search monetization.
Polish exchange croupier at full price: quality toll on financial + commodity markets, but watch at PLN 83.6 (6.61% base IRR).
Gold Royalty Corp. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Hawaiian Electric Industries — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

tickers.one_line_thesis: Hellenic Exchanges - Athens Stock Exchange S.A. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Horizon Kinetics Holding Corporation — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

Family-controlled Pennsylvania food processor (OTC Pink) trading near ~0.5× GAAP book with owned land and plant in PP&E — land-sleeve asset candidate pending NAV overlay on facilities/acreage vs ~$55 Class A quote.

Global exchange and market-infrastructure croupier with 20 consecutive record revenue years and ~80% exchange margins — quality toll booth, but Lawrence base IRR ~11% at $156 sits below the 15% hold band on mid-cycle FCF; watch for pullback or bull-case volume.

India's regulated power-market croupier: high-quality toll on electricity, REC, and gas volume, but at ₹124.07 the 7-year synthesis return (9.74%) is below a core-add hurdle; watch until price or FY2025 earnings refresh improves the math.

Michigan mineral royalty optionality (>1M acres, Copperwood/Highland Copper leases) with patient balance sheet — asymmetric upside if mining develops, steady burn and single-tenant concentration until royalties activate.
Passive U.S. mineral/ORRI owner paying ~$1.60/unit FY2025 distributions; 12.6% base IRR at $15.52 is below bar — watch until leverage normalizes or price improves.

Gladstone Land is an externally managed farmland REIT (~99k acres across 14 states plus California water assets) — land-sleeve triple-net lease income with periodic farm sales; NAV vs monthly dividend yield pending deep dive.
Delaware Basin land toll with strong FY2025 cash proof, but Class A-attributable owner cash at ~$73 yields ~1.8% Lawrence base — watch for price or governance/cash-attribution improvement.

California citrus-and-land platform (~10,500 acres, water rights, Harvest JV) priced near GAAP book; dated development cash and ag transformation offer partial dhando. Watch until Sunkist margins and distribution cadence prove out (~5.3% base yield-curve at ~$11.83).
Global data/index/clearing croupier with 50%+ margins and strong cash conversion; quality franchise at ~£91 implies 12.6% base return — watch below 15% bar.
At ~$633, Meta's Family of Apps funds AI capex and Reality Labs; Lawrence base annual return 5.9% (watch stance) pending proof that $125–145B 2026 capex earns owner cash.

Global insurance broker and consulting compounder: FY2025 revenue $27B, ~23% operating margin; at ~$157 Lawrence base ~17% annual return supports hold; dhando partial on leverage and cycle.

MicroStrategy Incorporated — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

Nebius Group N.V. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

Nasdaq Inc. is a global croupier (exchange + FinTech SaaS) with durable toll economics but cyclical transaction mix; at $86.66 synthesis return 9.26%/yr supports watch until price approaches $58–65 for core-return hurdle.

NuScale Power Corporation — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
AI Data Cloud platform on consumption pricing: strong product growth and positive FCF, but watch at ~$240 (~6.7% base IRR) until owner cash per share proves at post-earnings run rate.

Essential financial intelligence — ratings, indices, and data subscriptions — a Stahl croupier / index infrastructure compounder with extraordinary margins; earnings leverage to issuance and AUM with cyclicality at the margin.

Star Holdings trades ~54% below Q1 2026 book (~$19.88/sh) as a legacy iStar wind-down with a large Safehold stake; base case 10.4% per year if ~75% of book is returned over five years — watch pending related-party review.
Israel's central exchange croupier: durable toll on trading, clearing, listing, and data, but watch at ~NIS 145 where FY2024-normalized owner cash implies ~-13%/yr base return.

Swedish industrial serial acquirer of niche subsidiaries — decentralized Pabrai-style model with 2025–2026 margin/FCF turnaround underway; organic sales still negative while unprofitable units are pruned.

Tejon Ranch Co. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.
Tesla, Inc. — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

Vox Royalty is a gold-weighted micro-cap royalty/streamer with 70+ assets and record FY2025 cash flow; at $5.20 the seven-year return is 5.4% per year (synthesis) — watch until 2026 receipt guidance converts to durable per-share owner cash.

Post-EWSR generic pharma; 13.11% synthesis IRR ($1.50/sh 50/50 Marvin/Rosen); Lawrence gate 12.7%; floor 9.9% on $1.45. Rosen Sohn: Idorsia Phase III + cash-yield re-rating (catalyst capped, not 12mo double in base). ~$14B net debt; watch.

Delaware Basin produced-water infrastructure with strong Adj. EBITDA growth ($254M FY2025) and ~2,500 miles of pipe — asset-heavy midstream toll model, not Stahl croupier; thesis blocked by IPO/combination complexity and Five Point sponsor control.

Leading precious-metals streamer with filing-backed volume growth (2026 GEO guide 860K to 940K) but watch at ~$116: mid-cycle owner cash implies -1.03% per year over seven years, below our accumulate bar.
Debt-free East Tennessee land company (73,000+ acres) operating Windrock Park OHV recreation plus timber/royalty income; watch at ~$520 with 5.91% base annual return on ~$38/sh normalized owner cash.

Canada's dominant exchange croupier with a growing global data and analytics arm (GSIA); quality franchise at ~$50 CAD prices in a 9.66% per year base return versus a ~15% hurdle — watch until cheaper entry or faster GSIA growth.
Brazil's #1 independent investment platform: R$1.49T client assets, fee toll on AuC and cross-sell; accumulate at ~25.91% base IRR (~$15.26 ADR) pending governance review.
